mapper.sql: id, customer_no, province, city, region, address, CAddress1, postcode, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, region_code
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_customer_address_2del
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_customer_address_2del (id, customer_no, province, city, region, address, CAddress1, postcode, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, region_code) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{regionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

id,
customer_no,
province,
city,
region,
address,
CAddress1,
postcode,
delflag,
cre_time,
creator,
modify_time,
modifier,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_customer_address_2del
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{record.region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAddress1 = #{record.caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
region_code = #{record.regionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_customer_address_2del set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{record.region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{record.address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAddress1 = #{record.caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postcode = #{record.postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, region_code = #{record.regionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_customer_address_2del
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CAddress1 = #{caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
postcode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
region_code = #{regionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update dbo.ops_customer_address_2del set customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, region = #{region,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAddress1 = #{caddress1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, postcode = #{postcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, region_code = #{regionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
